name: Pecan Spice Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Maple syrup, or other liquid
3/4 cup Brown date sugar, barley malt powder
3/4 cup Flour, whole wheat, or kamut
1/2 cup Raisins, currants, or dates, chopped
Dashes of nutmeg, ginger, and cloves
1/4 cup Coconut, unsweetened, shredded (up to 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Mix the oil and sweeteners together well. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients, then slowly stir them into the liquid mixture. For each cookie, drop 1-2 tbsp of the dough onto lightly oiled cookie sheets, about 2"-3 inches apart. Bake for 9-12 minutes, until lightly browned but still soft. Cool on wire racks. The cookies will get crispy as they cool.
